name: Compare Columns
description: Compare columns between two DataFrames using key ID columns. Produces column-level match and difference statistics with example differing values.
input: Accepts two DataFrames as input for comparison.
output: Returns a summary DataFrame with match counts, difference counts, and example differing values per column.

fields.name: idColumns
fields.title: Primary Key / Join Columns
fields.description: Select one or more key columns used to join the two DataFrames. These columns uniquely identify rows for comparison.

fields.name: outputColumnName
fields.title: Compared Column Name Field
fields.description: Name of the output column that lists the compared column names.

fields.name: matchCountColumnName
fields.title: Match Count Field
fields.description: Name of the output column that contains the count of matching rows per compared column.

fields.name: differenceCountColumnName
fields.title: Difference Count Field
fields.description: Name of the output column that contains the count of non-matching rows per compared column.

fields.name: differenceExampleLeftColumnName
fields.title: Difference Sample Value (First Dataset)
fields.description: Name of the output column showing a sample differing value from the first DataFrame.

fields.name: differenceExampleRightColumnName
fields.title: Difference Sample Value (Second Dataset)
fields.description: Name of the output column showing a sample differing value from the second DataFrame.

fields.name: differenceExampleIdColumnPrefix
fields.title: Difference Sample ID Column Prefix
fields.description: Prefix used for output columns that show ID values where differences occurred (e.g., difference_sample_customer_id).

fields.name: outputColNames
fields.title: Explicit Output Column Names
fields.description: Explicitly define the output schema column names. If left empty, schema is inferred automatically.

fields.name: outputColTypes
fields.title: Explicit Output Column Data Types
fields.description: Explicitly define the output schema column data types. If left empty, schema is inferred automatically.
